participants.name: Dekel Crowdus
participants.notes: Transfer from Kentucky/Hawaii. SI official results report 4.36 40; BadgerNotes reports 4.37. Used official Wisconsin results (4.36). Best broad jump of the day.

participants.name: Austin Brown
participants.notes: Team-high 43-inch vertical. RAS of 8.94 per MathBomb.

participants.name: Vinny Anthony II
participants.notes: Re-tested after NFL Combine. Improved 40 from 4.63 to 4.53, vertical from ~34 to 37, and 3-cone from 6.86 to 6.68.

participants.name: Nyzier Fourqurean
participants.notes: Transfer from Grand Valley State (DII). Missed entire 2025 season due to eligibility dispute. Shuttle and 3-cone would have led all CBs at the Combine.

participants.name: Ben Barten
participants.notes: Led all Wisconsin players with 33 bench reps. Would have tied for 2nd among all positions at the 2026 Combine.

participants.name: Mason Reiger
participants.notes: Did not re-test drills at Pro Day after testing at NFL Combine (4.78 40, 40-inch vertical, 1.61 10-yard split). On hand to support teammates and meet with NFL teams. Did positional drills only.

participants.name: Riley Mahlman
participants.notes: Did not receive NFL Combine invite. Listed at 6-8, 318 lbs. Specific drill results not reported in available sources. Over 3,000 career snaps at tackle.

participants.name: Ricardo Hallman
participants.notes: Listed at 5-10. Specific drill results not reported in available sources. PFF Big Board rank 430.

participants.name: Darryl Peterson
participants.notes: Veteran OLB/EDGE. Specific drill results not reported in available sources. UDFA hopeful.

participants.name: Corey Walker
participants.notes: Transfer from Western Michigan. Listed at 6-5, 290. PFF Big Board rank 419. Specific drill results not reported in available sources.

participants.name: Lance Mason
participants.notes: Transfer from Missouri State. Led Wisconsin TEs in receiving in 2025 (30 catches, 398 yards, 4 TDs). Specific drill results not reported in available sources.

participants.name: Jay'viar Suggs
participants.notes: Defensive lineman. Specific drill results not reported in available sources.

additional_notes: Held Friday, March 6, 2026 at the McClain Center (indoor). Approximately 20 players participated in front of scouts from all 32 NFL teams. The full unofficial results were shared by a Wisconsin team spokesperson and published as an embedded image/table on SI.com, but the complete table with all ~20 participants could not be fully extracted from available text sources. Only highlighted individual results from articles were recoverable. Mason Reiger (EDGE) was present but opted not to re-run drills after his strong NFL Combine performance. Additional participants likely included players such as Preston Zachman (S, suffered season-ending injury in 2025 — unclear if he participated), Aaron Witt, Christian Alliegro, and others whose results were not individually reported in the available text coverage. The Wisconsin Football Twitter account posted results throughout the day. Timing method (electronic vs. hand-timed) was not explicitly confirmed in reporting, though results were described as 'unofficial' from team officials.
